stage.headline: Excellent design & easy installation

stage.headline: Personal comfort
stage.subline: With features like odour absorption, the air dryer, nightlight and the smartphone app GROHE Sensia Arena offers truly personal comfort.

stage.headline: Ultimate hygiene
stage.subline: GROHE Sensia Arena incorporates different innovative technologies that all work together to give you the most hygienic experience with minimum effort.

stage.headline: Perfect body care
stage.subline: GROHE’s shower toilet spray technology is developed to give you an experience of cleansing that is powerful yet still gentle, always precise and tailored to your individual taste.

stage.headline: Unnecessary concerns
